Title: Cozy Rainy Day Vibes Mug and Books Stack Arrangement
Description:
Capture the perfect feeling of a cozy, rainy day retreat with this beautifully styled mockup.

This scene features a steaming mug of hot beverage placed on a windowsill, surrounded by stacks of classic books. The rainy window pane backdrop adds a touch of serene, melancholic beauty, making it an ideal setting for creative content or lifestyle branding.

Key Features & Benefits:

  • Atmospheric Appeal: The dramatic rain-streaked window creates an instant, warm, and inviting mood.
  • Perfect Styling Element: Ideal for showcasing products like coffee, tea, literature, journaling supplies, or cozy home decor.
  • High Quality Mockup: Features realistic steam rising from the mug, making the scene feel authentic and lived-in.

Use this mockup to promote: Self-care routines, reading corners, seasonal comfort items, or gourmet beverages. Excellent for blogs, social media campaigns, and e-commerce landing pages.
